description: Baseline: BF16, TP=1, BS=16, no quant, all flags pinned explicitly
+TP=1 explicit: removes inter-GPU comm overhead on 8B model
+max_model_len=2668: dataset minimum (2540+128). 148x concurrency vs 3x at default
+expandable_segments:True: root cause fix for all mid-run segfaults
+sort queries by input length: mean latency -24pct, throughput +0.7pct
+enable_prefix_caching=False explicit: zero hit rate on CNN DailyMail
batch_size 512->1024: +3.4pct throughput. BS=2048 regresses. Optimal confirmed.
